items.title: Emery's title 'dream' over - but will Villa salvage top-five hopes?
items.summary: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery concedes his Premier League title "dreams" are over, but will the club resurrect their Champions League hopes?

items.title: Madrid-City again in UCL draw, Chelsea get PSG
items.summary: Real Madrid have been handed another mouthwatering clash with Manchester City in the round-of-16 draw for the Champions League, while holders Paris Saint-Germain face Chelsea.

items.title: Messi knocked to ground as fans invade field in PR
items.summary: Lionel Messi was knocked to the ground by a fan and a security guard at the end of Inter Miami's friendly match in Puerto Rico on Thursday.

items.title: Kompany: Klassiker win deserves its own title
items.summary: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany says winning Der Klassiker against Borussia Dortmund deserves a title in itself.

items.title: Heerenveen kondigt eerbetoon aan voor Friese medaillewinnaars
items.summary: SC Heerenveen heeft aangekondigd de Friese medaillewinnaars op de Olympische Winterspelen te gaan huldigen. Op zaterdag 14 maart worden de schaatshelden geëerd.

items.title: Telstar met bravoure naar AZ: 'We kunnen iedereen aan'
items.summary: Het was een heerlijke vrijdagavond voor Telstar. De ploeg van Anthony Correia capituleerde dit seizoen al vaak in de slotfase van wedstrijden, maar nu schoten ze er tegen NAC Breda nog twee ballen in. De 3-0 zege biedt vertrouwen richting de halve finale van de beker.

items.title: Premier League news: Guardiola says silverware hunt decided ‘in the head’; Gordon ‘must stay focused’
items.summary: City manager wants players rested for run-in, Howe wary of Arsenal interest and Moyes wrestles with ‘dark arts’ Continue reading...

items.title: Igor Tudor accuses ‘fatigued’ Tottenham squad of lacking fitness and desire
items.summary: Interim head coach concerned by physical levels in squad ‘We need to put petrol in the engine so it works better’ Igor Tudor says his Tottenham players are not fit enough and has questioned their desire to put in the hard yards without the ball. The interim head coach has a clearer idea of the problems he faces after two weeks – and there are many of them, including low levels of confidence and the capacity of the younger players to handle the pressure of a relegation battle. Continue reading...

items.title: Late DRAMA as Wolves STUN Aston Villa in West Midlands derby
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Wolves’ match against Aston Villa in the Premier League.

items.title: Aston Villa kan titeldroom opbergen na blamage op Molineux
items.summary: Als Aston Villa stiekem nog droomde van het kampioenschap in de Premier League, kan de club die ambitie na vrijdagavond vaarwel zeggen. De Villans verloren de streekderby op bezoek bij Wolverhampton Wanderers, dat de drie punten amper nog nodig heeft in het kader van de allang verloren strijd tegen degradatie.

items.title: Dual Gomes goals ensure Wolves beat Aston Villa and unwanted points record
items.summary: As Wolves applied the seal to only their second Premier League victory of the season, Rodrigo Gomes doubling their lead over Aston Villa deep into second-half stoppage time, Rob Edwards hared down the touchline, yelling into the stands as his players started a celebratory pile-on a few yards behind him. It was a moment of catharsis for Edwards, who beat his chest and wellied an advertising hoarding, but for Unai Emery it was a different kind of cue. As those in old gold savoured a win over near neighbours that takes them to 13 points, ending any fears that they may not eclipse Derby’s record-low tally of 11 in 2007-08, Emery marched straight down the tunnel before the post-match handshakes. Continue reading...

items.title: Kuijt geeft play-offs-ticket uit handen met Dordrecht: 'Dan moet je doodziek zijn'
items.summary: Dirk Kuijt is doodziek van het misgelopen play-off-ticket. FC Dordrecht moest winnen van Jong PSV, maar kwam niet verder dan een gelijkspel. Doordat concurrent Willem II wel won, hebben de Tilburgers beslag gelegd op het ticket.

items.title: RC Lens maakt pas op de plaats in Franse titelstrijd
items.summary: RC Lens heeft vrijdag een pas op de plaats gemaakt in de Franse titelstrijd. De nummer twee van de Ligue 1 beet zich stuk op Strasbourg. Door de remise heeft Lens het vanaf heden niet meer in eigen hand.

items.title: Messi tackled by pitch invader in Inter Miami game
items.summary: Argentina captain Lionel Messi is hauled to the ground by a pitch invader during Inter Miami's friendly in Puerto Rico.

items.title: Henman: 'Raducanu is better off without a coach'
items.summary: Tim Henman feels Emma Raducanu is better off without a coach despite the British No 1 reuniting with Mark Petchey on an informal basis ahead of Indian Wells - live on Sky Sports Tennis.
